title_zh: DeepReport：面向科学研究的 AI 辅助想法生成系统
title_en: DeepReport: An AI-Assisted Idea Generation System for Scientific Research
excerpt_zh: DeepReport 将学术大数据、概念共现图、时间链接预测与大语言模型结合起来，帮助研究者从海量论文中发现跨学科连接，并把潜在连接转化为可讨论的研究想法。
excerpt_en: DeepReport combines academic big data, evolving concept co-occurrence graphs, temporal link prediction, and large language models to help researchers discover cross-domain connections and turn them into actionable research ideas.
